overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a desert bridge overpass during golden hour. The character emerges from under a concrete structure and walks along the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the left, with futuristic holographic billboards and desert vegetation visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete overpass exit transitioning to bridge walkway

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open bridge area
emerges from shadow into direct golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the dark overpass onto the sunlit bridge sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: dark concrete walls and ceiling of the overpass tunnel
gray concrete safety barrier with graffiti along the bridge edge
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines
wooden utility pole with wires and transformer box

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark concrete overpass, then transitions into bright sunlight as the character emerges onto a bridge walkway. The concrete barrier wall runs along the right side while vehicles pass on the left. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to warm golden hour sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with desert landscape and city views

events.description: yellow van passes closely on the left side of the road
large truck and multiple vehicles pass by in quick succession

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along the bridge sidewalk with a steady stream of vehicles passing on the left

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving uphill on the bridge

entered.detail: desert Joshua trees and scrub vegetation on the hillside
tall futuristic holographic advertisement tower with glowing display
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open bridge with full sky visibility and warm sunlight. The concrete barrier continues on the right while desert vegetation and mountains appear on the left. A futuristic holographic billboard is visible in the distance on the right. Vehicles pass regularly on the road, including a prominent yellow van.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge curve with bus stop shelter and coastal desert view

events.description: camera begins turning right to follow the road curve
approaches bus stop shelter and the road curves to the right

agents.ego_description: reaching the crest of the bridge and turning right to follow the road curve toward the bus shelter

notable_agents.action: white car navigating the curve ahead on the road

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus shelter with bench near the road curve
tall palm trees lining the roadside ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character reaching the top of the bridge where the road curves to the right. The camera turns to follow the curve, revealing a bus stop shelter and palm trees ahead. The concrete barrier exits the frame as the view opens up to show the curved road and distant desert mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shadows of a concrete underpass into a vast, sun-drenched desert landscape. It begins in the darkness beneath an overpass before emerging into the bright, warm glow of the golden hour on a bridge walkway, where a concrete barrier lines the right and vehicles pass on the left. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal desert vegetation, distant mountains, and a futuristic holographic billboard shimmering against the open sky while a yellow van drives past. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the crest of the bridge, where the road curves to the right and the concrete barrier exits the frame. Finally, the camera turns to follow this bend, opening up to a view of a bus stop shelter and palm trees set against the backdrop of the far-off desert peaks.
